sql_array: CREATE TABLE test1 (id UInt32, s LowCardinality(String), n Nullable(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test1 VALUES (1, 'alpha', 10), (2, 'beta', NULL), (3, 'alpha', 15), (4, 'gamma', 20), (5, 'beta', NULL);
CREATE TABLE test2 (id UInt32, ref_id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;

SELECT t1.s, lowCardinalityIndices(t1.s) % (SELECT count() FROM test2) AS position_mod FROM test1 AS t1 LEFT JOIN test2 AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t1.n IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t1.s ORDER BY position_mod;
SELECT id, s, lowCardinalityIndices(s) + (n % 5) AS modified_index FROM test1 HAVING modified_index < 5;
SELECT COUNT(), lowCardinalityIndices(s) % 2 AS mod_index FROM test1 GROUP BY s HAVING mod_index = 0;
SELECT t1.s, lowCardinalityIndices(t1.s) AS dict_index FROM test1 AS t1 WHERE (dict_index % 2) = 0 AND n IS NOT NULL ORDER BY n DESC;
CREATE TABLE temp_test AS SELECT id, s FROM test1 WHERE s LIKE '%beta%';
INSERT INTO temp_test SELECT id + 100, s FROM test1 WHERE id <= 2;
SELECT s, lowCardinalityIndices(s) % (SELECT COUNT() FROM temp_test) AS index_mod FROM test1 GROUP BY s HAVING index_mod IN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_test);
